role_in_current_paper: Scale and mechanism reference for gas-solid fines clogging in packed beds.
current_paper_addition: Adds DEM-derived voxel connectivity and topology diagnostics to distinguish breakthrough from structural clogging.

study_context: fine and ultrafine deposition in packed-bed reactors
role_in_current_paper: Reference for particle deposition and retention in packed-bed pore pathways.
current_paper_addition: Links deposition profiles to DEM-derived pore connectivity and a pressure-free clogging pre-screening index.

role_in_current_paper: Closest author-side reference for gas-powder packed-bed transport and physical scale.
current_paper_addition: Moves from flow/particle transport toward DEM-derived pore-structure and topology interpretation in Li4SiO4 breeder beds.

role_in_current_paper: Supports the distinction between particle retention and hydraulic clogging.
current_paper_addition: Provides DEM-resolved debris locations and voxel connectivity evidence for that distinction in a breeder pebble bed.

role_in_current_paper: Supports multi-stage clogging interpretation and the non-equivalence of transport and blockage signals.
current_paper_addition: Applies this separation to DEM-derived pebble-bed debris migration and pore-connectivity diagnostics.

study_context: particle retention and clogging in porous media
role_in_current_paper: Reference for pore-scale particle retention/clogging mechanisms and pressure response.
current_paper_addition: Focuses on DEM-generated Li4SiO4 pebble beds and separates BTC, local blockage and outlet-connected pore skeleton metrics.

role_in_current_paper: Supports Euler/Minkowski-style topology descriptors for porous media.
current_paper_addition: Combines such descriptors with DEM debris transport and retention metrics.

role_in_current_paper: Supports box-counting fractal interpretation of solid and pore structures.
current_paper_addition: Uses fractal dimension as one descriptor in a DEM-derived voxel-topology workflow.
Integrates BTC, retention, local blockage, outlet-connected void fraction, Euler/topological charge and fractal descriptors in a pre-clogging mechanism framework.
